name: sales-coach
description: 销售AI陪练 — AI驱动的销售技能训练桌面应用

scripts.dev:electron: cross-env NODE_ENV=development concurrently "npm run dev:server" "npm run dev:client" "wait-on http://localhost:5173 && electron ."
scripts.build: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.build:web: npm run build:client && npm run build:server
scripts.dist:cloud: npm run build:web && cross-env CLOUD_URL=http://localhost:3001 electron-builder --win
scripts.mobile:init: cd client && npm run build && npx cap sync
scripts.mobile:ios: cd client && npm run build && npx cap sync && npx cap open ios
scripts.mobile:android: cd client && npm run build && npx cap sync && npx cap open android
